Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}This is the route we always take to school! We've gotta protect it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It's almost like they're waiting for us...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Uh, he wasn't in his room, so who knows?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Um, we should probably hurry. I think they're about to make their move.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Then we have no choice. Let's organize a team from the members we have here.[n]{f 1 1}
